name_en: 🌸 [No packaging for this size] Y Brand 2024 Fall New LE 5A 7 HOBO Bag, continuing the classic hobo style, minimalist yet stylish 👑 The bag is made of black grained cowhide, with a thin leather strip running through the opening. The gold letter logo clasp is the focal point, paired with a black suede leather lining. The practical bucket shape adapts to casual vacation or city scenes 👍
